title: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade
text:
1. a) General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade
Geneva, 30 October 1947
.ENTRY INTO FORCE: provisionally on 1 January 1948.
REGISTRATION: 30 May 1950, No. 814.
TEXT: United Nations, Treaty Series , vol. 64, p. 187.
.
X 1 A. INTERNATIONAL TRADE AND DEVELOPMENT 1
text_reference: United Nations,  Treaty Series , vol. 64, p. 187.
